change: Neutral built-in profiles; config ships without machine-specific values.

Renamed setup→configure-pr-controller; guarded the config write so it never clobbers an existing config; added confirm-it-worked, first-run-safety, and gh-derived transport-verify steps; corrected JSON/cloneRoot/profile gotchas.
snag: bare heredoc wiped a populated config on re-setup

change: Corrected the false claim that the first poll fires on startup — polling is OFF by default and never auto-starts (server.ts). Reframed the intro warning and split Run into explicit scope/launch/arm steps: launching is inert, arming (the dashboard polling toggle) is what runs for real.
snag: over-warned during a real setup session that launching itself dispatches live workers
